[Technology, Media & Telecom](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/technologie/index.html). ![Generative AI enters the sustainability transition](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/media/ai-duurzaamheid_2312465757_538_tcm16-216550.jpg). 14/12/2023 • 4 minutes read. [Julia Krauwer](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/auteurs/julia-krauwer/index.html). Cas Bogaard. Since 2018, investors have put 793 million dollars into young companies that apply “generative AI” for sustainability purposes.

[Technology, Media & Telecom](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/technologie/index.html). ![Generative AI enters the sustainability transition](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/media/ai-duurzaamheid_2312465757_538_tcm16-216550.jpg). 14/12/2023 • 4 minutes read. [Julia Krauwer](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/auteurs/julia-krauwer/index.html). Cas Bogaard. text: Generative AI enters the sustainability transition. [Report](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/rapporten/index.html). [Technology, Media & Telecom](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/technologie/index.html). ![Generative AI enters the sustainability transition](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/media/ai-duurzaamheid_2312465757_538_tcm16-216550.jpg). 14/12/2023 • 4 minutes read. [Julia Krauwer](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/auteurs/julia-krauwer/index.html). Cas Bogaard. Since 2018, investors have put 793 million dollars into young companies that apply “generative AI” for sustainability purposes. This form of artificial intelligence can create many things based on instructions, such as text, 3D designs and even new materials. However, the potential sustainability gains come with the high energy use of AI technology.

Developments in artificial intelligence, also called AI for short, accelerated after the ultra-smart chatbot ChatGPT was introduced at the end of 2022. Since then, the big technology companies have raced to introduce new AI models that generate ever better answers to increasingly complex questions and, based on written instructions, create impressive images and video material. Although people often talk about the entertainment value of generative AI and potential productivity gains, there are also potential applications in sustainability.

[Generative AI enters the sustainability transition (December 2023). 3 MB](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/media/Generative-AI-enters-the-sustainability-transition_tcm16-223327.pdf). Developments in artificial intelligence, also called AI for short, accelerated after the ultra-smart chatbot ChatGPT was introduced at the end of 2022. Since then, the big technology companies have raced to introduce new AI models that generate ever better answers to increasingly complex questions and, based on written instructions, create impressive images and video material. Although people often talk about the entertainment value of generative AI and potential productivity gains, there are also potential applications in sustainability. We cannot ignore this perspective now that the effects of global warming are painfully clear in many places.

id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0014
text: Developments in artificial intelligence, also called AI for short, accelerated after the ultra-smart chatbot ChatGPT was introduced at the end of 2022. Since then, the big technology companies have raced to introduce new AI models that generate ever better answers to increasingly complex questions and, based on written instructions, create impressive images and video material. Although people often talk about the entertainment value of generative AI and potential productivity gains, there are also potential applications in sustainability. We cannot ignore this perspective now that the effects of global warming are painfully clear in many places. The new technology can complement legislation and regulation, financing and behavioural change.

id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0015
text: Since then, the big technology companies have raced to introduce new AI models that generate ever better answers to increasingly complex questions and, based on written instructions, create impressive images and video material. Although people often talk about the entertainment value of generative AI and potential productivity gains, there are also potential applications in sustainability. We cannot ignore this perspective now that the effects of global warming are painfully clear in many places. The new technology can complement legislation and regulation, financing and behavioural change. Twin Transition: where technology and sustainability meet.

metadata.chunk_id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0015

id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0016
text: Although people often talk about the entertainment value of generative AI and potential productivity gains, there are also potential applications in sustainability. We cannot ignore this perspective now that the effects of global warming are painfully clear in many places. The new technology can complement legislation and regulation, financing and behavioural change. Twin Transition: where technology and sustainability meet. The rise of generative AI is a textbook example of the “twin transition”.

metadata.chunk_id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0016

metadata.source_title: Generative AI enters the sustainability transition

id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0017
text: We cannot ignore this perspective now that the effects of global warming are painfully clear in many places. The new technology can complement legislation and regulation, financing and behavioural change. Twin Transition: where technology and sustainability meet. The rise of generative AI is a textbook example of the “twin transition”. This term refers to the digital transition and the sustainability transition, which take place at the same time and influence each other.

metadata.chunk_id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0017
metadata.source_slug: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie
metadata.source_title: Generative AI enters the sustainability transition

id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0018
text: The new technology can complement legislation and regulation, financing and behavioural change. Twin Transition: where technology and sustainability meet. The rise of generative AI is a textbook example of the “twin transition”. This term refers to the digital transition and the sustainability transition, which take place at the same time and influence each other. Companies that are further ahead in digitalisation perform, for example, [better](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0040162522007934) on sustainability.

metadata.chunk_id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0018

metadata.source_title: Generative AI enters the sustainability transition

id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0019
text: Twin Transition: where technology and sustainability meet. The rise of generative AI is a textbook example of the “twin transition”. This term refers to the digital transition and the sustainability transition, which take place at the same time and influence each other. Companies that are further ahead in digitalisation perform, for example, [better](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0040162522007934) on sustainability. Scientific literature also points to a positive contribution by AI to the Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) defined by the United Nations.

metadata.chunk_id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0019
metadata.source_slug: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie
metadata.source_title: Generative AI enters the sustainability transition

id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0020
text: The rise of generative AI is a textbook example of the “twin transition”. This term refers to the digital transition and the sustainability transition, which take place at the same time and influence each other. Companies that are further ahead in digitalisation perform, for example, [better](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0040162522007934) on sustainability. Scientific literature also points to a positive contribution by AI to the Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) defined by the United Nations. Specifically for the SDGs related to climate change, natural ecosystems and making sectors more sustainable, this applies to 50 of the 55 sub-targets.

metadata.chunk_id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0020
metadata.source_slug: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie
metadata.source_title: Generative AI enters the sustainability transition

id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0021
text: This term refers to the digital transition and the sustainability transition, which take place at the same time and influence each other. Companies that are further ahead in digitalisation perform, for example, [better](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0040162522007934) on sustainability. Scientific literature also points to a positive contribution by AI to the Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) defined by the United Nations. Specifically for the SDGs related to climate change, natural ecosystems and making sectors more sustainable, this applies to 50 of the 55 sub-targets. At the same time, AI also appears to have a dampening effect on 18 of these sub-targets — sometimes at the same time.

metadata.chunk_id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0021
metadata.source_slug: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie
metadata.source_title: Generative AI enters the sustainability transition

id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0022
text: Companies that are further ahead in digitalisation perform, for example, [better](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0040162522007934) on sustainability. Scientific literature also points to a positive contribution by AI to the Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) defined by the United Nations. Specifically for the SDGs related to climate change, natural ecosystems and making sectors more sustainable, this applies to 50 of the 55 sub-targets. At the same time, AI also appears to have a dampening effect on 18 of these sub-targets — sometimes at the same time. This is partly due to the large amount of energy needed to develop and use AI models.

metadata.chunk_id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0022
metadata.source_slug: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie
metadata.source_title: Generative AI enters the sustainability transition

id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0023
text: Scientific literature also points to a positive contribution by AI to the Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) defined by the United Nations. Specifically for the SDGs related to climate change, natural ecosystems and making sectors more sustainable, this applies to 50 of the 55 sub-targets. At the same time, AI also appears to have a dampening effect on 18 of these sub-targets — sometimes at the same time. This is partly due to the large amount of energy needed to develop and use AI models. Investors see value in AI as a supporter of the sustainability transition.

metadata.chunk_id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0023
metadata.source_slug: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie
metadata.source_title: Generative AI enters the sustainability transition

id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0024
text: Specifically for the SDGs related to climate change, natural ecosystems and making sectors more sustainable, this applies to 50 of the 55 sub-targets. At the same time, AI also appears to have a dampening effect on 18 of these sub-targets — sometimes at the same time. This is partly due to the large amount of energy needed to develop and use AI models. Investors see value in AI as a supporter of the sustainability transition. In 2021 — when the technology market showed huge growth after the initial “coronavirus shock” — investors worldwide put 25.2 billion dollars into sustainable AI start-ups, according to data from data collector Net Zero Insights.

metadata.chunk_id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0024
metadata.source_slug: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie
metadata.source_title: Generative AI enters the sustainability transition

id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0025
text: At the same time, AI also appears to have a dampening effect on 18 of these sub-targets — sometimes at the same time. This is partly due to the large amount of energy needed to develop and use AI models. Investors see value in AI as a supporter of the sustainability transition. In 2021 — when the technology market showed huge growth after the initial “coronavirus shock” — investors worldwide put 25.2 billion dollars into sustainable AI start-ups, according to data from data collector Net Zero Insights. In 2022, this amount fell to 21.4 billion dollars due to rising interest rates and a generally less favourable investment climate, and 2023 has not been immune to these dynamics either.

metadata.chunk_id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0025

id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0026
text: This is partly due to the large amount of energy needed to develop and use AI models. Investors see value in AI as a supporter of the sustainability transition. In 2021 — when the technology market showed huge growth after the initial “coronavirus shock” — investors worldwide put 25.2 billion dollars into sustainable AI start-ups, according to data from data collector Net Zero Insights. In 2022, this amount fell to 21.4 billion dollars due to rising interest rates and a generally less favourable investment climate, and 2023 has not been immune to these dynamics either. On 1 December, the counter stood at 18.5 billion.

In 2022, this amount fell to 21.4 billion dollars due to rising interest rates and a generally less favourable investment climate, and 2023 has not been immune to these dynamics either. id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0028
text: In 2021 — when the technology market showed huge growth after the initial “coronavirus shock” — investors worldwide put 25.2 billion dollars into sustainable AI start-ups, according to data from data collector Net Zero Insights. In 2022, this amount fell to 21.4 billion dollars due to rising interest rates and a generally less favourable investment climate, and 2023 has not been immune to these dynamics either. On 1 December, the counter stood at 18.5 billion. Sustainable applications of generative AI. This report explores various sustainable applications of generative AI based on investments in start-ups and scale-ups that are active in this area.

text: In 2022, this amount fell to 21.4 billion dollars due to rising interest rates and a generally less favourable investment climate, and 2023 has not been immune to these dynamics either. On 1 December, the counter stood at 18.5 billion. Sustainable applications of generative AI. This report explores various sustainable applications of generative AI based on investments in start-ups and scale-ups that are active in this area. These applications are already firmly embraced in the field of corporate reporting and analysis of climate risk and climate impact.

id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0030
text: On 1 December, the counter stood at 18.5 billion. Sustainable applications of generative AI. This report explores various sustainable applications of generative AI based on investments in start-ups and scale-ups that are active in this area. These applications are already firmly embraced in the field of corporate reporting and analysis of climate risk and climate impact. Several software companies use AI’s language talent to convert large amounts of company data into clear reports and insights.

metadata.source_slug: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie
metadata.source_title: Generative AI enters the sustainability transition

id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0031
text: Sustainable applications of generative AI. This report explores various sustainable applications of generative AI based on investments in start-ups and scale-ups that are active in this area. These applications are already firmly embraced in the field of corporate reporting and analysis of climate risk and climate impact. Several software companies use AI’s language talent to convert large amounts of company data into clear reports and insights. Virtual assistants are also prominent.

metadata.chunk_id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0031
metadata.source_slug: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie
metadata.source_title: Generative AI enters the sustainability transition

id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0032
text: This report explores various sustainable applications of generative AI based on investments in start-ups and scale-ups that are active in this area. These applications are already firmly embraced in the field of corporate reporting and analysis of climate risk and climate impact. Several software companies use AI’s language talent to convert large amounts of company data into clear reports and insights. Virtual assistants are also prominent. They answer questions about sustainability issues in a natural dialogue and can provide advice to the user based on all kinds of data.

metadata.chunk_id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0032
metadata.source_slug: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie
metadata.source_title: Generative AI enters the sustainability transition

id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0033
text: These applications are already firmly embraced in the field of corporate reporting and analysis of climate risk and climate impact. Several software companies use AI’s language talent to convert large amounts of company data into clear reports and insights. Virtual assistants are also prominent. They answer questions about sustainability issues in a natural dialogue and can provide advice to the user based on all kinds of data. Together, these activities account for 258 million dollars in investments since 2018.

metadata.chunk_id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0033
metadata.source_slug: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie
metadata.source_title: Generative AI enters the sustainability transition

id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0034
text: Several software companies use AI’s language talent to convert large amounts of company data into clear reports and insights. Virtual assistants are also prominent. They answer questions about sustainability issues in a natural dialogue and can provide advice to the user based on all kinds of data. Together, these activities account for 258 million dollars in investments since 2018. In addition, generative AI can be used to design new materials and proteins more quickly, with specific applications and benefits.

metadata.chunk_id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0034
metadata.source_slug: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie
metadata.source_title: Generative AI enters the sustainability transition

id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0035
text: Virtual assistants are also prominent. They answer questions about sustainability issues in a natural dialogue and can provide advice to the user based on all kinds of data. Together, these activities account for 258 million dollars in investments since 2018. In addition, generative AI can be used to design new materials and proteins more quickly, with specific applications and benefits. Examples include green fuels, materials optimised for lifespan and recyclability, or enzymes that can break down plastic.

metadata.chunk_id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0035
metadata.source_slug: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie
metadata.source_title: Generative AI enters the sustainability transition

id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0036
text: They answer questions about sustainability issues in a natural dialogue and can provide advice to the user based on all kinds of data. Together, these activities account for 258 million dollars in investments since 2018. In addition, generative AI can be used to design new materials and proteins more quickly, with specific applications and benefits. Examples include green fuels, materials optimised for lifespan and recyclability, or enzymes that can break down plastic. Research into such new molecules is traditionally time-consuming with much trial and error.

metadata.chunk_id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0036
metadata.source_slug: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie
metadata.source_title: Generative AI enters the sustainability transition

id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0037
text: Together, these activities account for 258 million dollars in investments since 2018. In addition, generative AI can be used to design new materials and proteins more quickly, with specific applications and benefits. Examples include green fuels, materials optimised for lifespan and recyclability, or enzymes that can break down plastic. Research into such new molecules is traditionally time-consuming with much trial and error. Generative AI can greatly shorten this.

metadata.chunk_id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0037
metadata.source_slug: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie
metadata.source_title: Generative AI enters the sustainability transition

id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0038
text: In addition, generative AI can be used to design new materials and proteins more quickly, with specific applications and benefits. Examples include green fuels, materials optimised for lifespan and recyclability, or enzymes that can break down plastic. Research into such new molecules is traditionally time-consuming with much trial and error. Generative AI can greatly shorten this. Investors have so far put 85 million dollars into young companies in this category.

metadata.chunk_id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0038
metadata.source_slug: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie
metadata.source_title: Generative AI enters the sustainability transition

id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0039
text: Examples include green fuels, materials optimised for lifespan and recyclability, or enzymes that can break down plastic. Research into such new molecules is traditionally time-consuming with much trial and error. Generative AI can greatly shorten this. Investors have so far put 85 million dollars into young companies in this category. A more nascent function of generative AI is that of designer or engineer.

metadata.chunk_id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0039
metadata.source_slug: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie
metadata.source_title: Generative AI enters the sustainability transition

id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0040
text: Research into such new molecules is traditionally time-consuming with much trial and error. Generative AI can greatly shorten this. Investors have so far put 85 million dollars into young companies in this category. A more nascent function of generative AI is that of designer or engineer. The technology can, for example, help to personalise clothing so that the pieces produced match market demand better, and the negative environmental impact of unsold — and therefore needlessly produced — clothing is reduced.

metadata.chunk_id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0040
metadata.source_slug: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie
metadata.source_title: Generative AI enters the sustainability transition

id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0041
text: Generative AI can greatly shorten this. Investors have so far put 85 million dollars into young companies in this category. A more nascent function of generative AI is that of designer or engineer. The technology can, for example, help to personalise clothing so that the pieces produced match market demand better, and the negative environmental impact of unsold — and therefore needlessly produced — clothing is reduced. There are also opportunities in the built environment, such as buildings that are optimised with AI for energy efficiency and material use.

metadata.chunk_id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0041
metadata.source_slug: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie
metadata.source_title: Generative AI enters the sustainability transition

id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0042
text: Investors have so far put 85 million dollars into young companies in this category. A more nascent function of generative AI is that of designer or engineer. The technology can, for example, help to personalise clothing so that the pieces produced match market demand better, and the negative environmental impact of unsold — and therefore needlessly produced — clothing is reduced. There are also opportunities in the built environment, such as buildings that are optimised with AI for energy efficiency and material use. Current design methods are expected to be increasingly enhanced with generative AI.

metadata.chunk_id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0042
metadata.source_slug: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie
metadata.source_title: Generative AI enters the sustainability transition

id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0043
text: A more nascent function of generative AI is that of designer or engineer. The technology can, for example, help to personalise clothing so that the pieces produced match market demand better, and the negative environmental impact of unsold — and therefore needlessly produced — clothing is reduced. There are also opportunities in the built environment, such as buildings that are optimised with AI for energy efficiency and material use. Current design methods are expected to be increasingly enhanced with generative AI. Developing AI costs energy.

metadata.chunk_id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0043
metadata.source_slug: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie
metadata.source_title: Generative AI enters the sustainability transition

id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0044
text: The technology can, for example, help to personalise clothing so that the pieces produced match market demand better, and the negative environmental impact of unsold — and therefore needlessly produced — clothing is reduced. There are also opportunities in the built environment, such as buildings that are optimised with AI for energy efficiency and material use. Current design methods are expected to be increasingly enhanced with generative AI. Developing AI costs energy. Developing generative AI also has a price.

metadata.chunk_id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0044
metadata.source_slug: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie
metadata.source_title: Generative AI enters the sustainability transition

id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0045
text: There are also opportunities in the built environment, such as buildings that are optimised with AI for energy efficiency and material use. Current design methods are expected to be increasingly enhanced with generative AI. Developing AI costs energy. Developing generative AI also has a price. The technology works on the basis of large amounts of data, and the associated learning process — also called “training” — requires a lot of computing power.

metadata.chunk_id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0045
metadata.source_slug: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie
metadata.source_title: Generative AI enters the sustainability transition

id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0046
text: Current design methods are expected to be increasingly enhanced with generative AI. Developing AI costs energy. Developing generative AI also has a price. The technology works on the basis of large amounts of data, and the associated learning process — also called “training” — requires a lot of computing power. Training GPT-3.0 — one of the predecessors of the current models behind ChatGPT — was accompanied by 502 tonnes of CO2 emissions; the same as the annual emissions of 251 Dutch petrol cars.

metadata.chunk_id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0046
metadata.source_slug: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie
metadata.source_title: Generative AI enters the sustainability transition

id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0047
text: Developing AI costs energy. Developing generative AI also has a price. The technology works on the basis of large amounts of data, and the associated learning process — also called “training” — requires a lot of computing power. Training GPT-3.0 — one of the predecessors of the current models behind ChatGPT — was accompanied by 502 tonnes of CO2 emissions; the same as the annual emissions of 251 Dutch petrol cars. The constant stream of questions the model has to process also requires considerable computing power and energy.

metadata.chunk_id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0047
metadata.source_slug: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie
metadata.source_title: Generative AI enters the sustainability transition

id: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie__c5-sentence-window__0048
text: Developing generative AI also has a price. The technology works on the basis of large amounts of data, and the associated learning process — also called “training” — requires a lot of computing power. Training GPT-3.0 — one of the predecessors of the current models behind ChatGPT — was accompanied by 502 tonnes of CO2 emissions; the same as the annual emissions of 251 Dutch petrol cars. The constant stream of questions the model has to process also requires considerable computing power and energy. Although the applications outlined above are not used on the same scale as the immensely popular chatbot, it remains important to weigh both the positive and negative effects carefully when developing and applying generative AI.

The constant stream of questions the model has to process also requires considerable computing power and energy. Although the applications outlined above are not used on the same scale as the immensely popular chatbot, it remains important to weigh both the positive and negative effects carefully when developing and applying generative AI.
